title: PokeSkies Cobblemon
description: Cobblemon Modpack made up of performance and QoL mods, with content tuned for the PokeSkies Server!
body:
The PokeSkies Cobblemon modpack features performance enhancing and QoL mods that provide a smooth and enjoyable Cobblemon experience! This pack is tailor-made for the PokeSkies server, though it can be used anywhere you want, including singleplayer. This pack should run well on most systems, including lower end hardware. Ensure you have dedicated at least 4gbs of memory in the launcher options. After loading the modpack, the PokeSkies server should automatically appear in the Multiplayer server list!
Modpack Mods QoL / Base Mods - AppleSkin - BetterF3 - Cobblemon - Cobblemon Integrations - Cobblemon Move Inspector - Cobblemon UI Tweaks - Continuity - Controlling - Crafting Tweaks - Falling Leaves - Highlight - Iris - Jade - Lamb Dynamic Lights - Mouse Tweaks - Particle Rain - RoughlyEnoughItems (REI) - Searchables - TooltipFix - Xaeros Minimap (and Xaeros World Map) - Zoomify Performance Mods - Cull Less Leaves - Dynamic FPS - Enhanced Block Entities - Entity Culling - FastAnim - Ferrite Core - Fey Tweaks - Immediately Fast - Krypton - Lazy DFU - Lithium - Memory Leak Fix - More Culling - Sodium (plus Sodium Extras, Shadowy Paths, Sodium Options) - Starlight Library Mods - Architectury - Balm - Cloth Config - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - Indium - Mod Menu - YetAnotherConfigLib - YOSBR
**Discord**: https://discord.gg/Zd9T4KpnVU
